failure_signature.details: Connection to api.openai.com timed out after 10.0 seconds. (connect timeout=10.0)

problem.goal_state: Execute LangChain agent with web search and code execution tools

solutions.solution_summary: Increase connection timeout and configure retry logic for transient network issues
solution_steps: Increase the connection timeout on the ChatOpenAI instance: ChatOpenAI(model='gpt-4o', timeout=60, max_retries=3)
Check network connectivity to api.openai.com: curl -I https://api.openai.com/v1/models
If behind a corporate proxy, configure the HTTP_PROXY and HTTPS_PROXY environment variables
Verify DNS resolution: nslookup api.openai.com should return valid IP addresses
If in a containerized environment, ensure the container has outbound internet access on port 443

failure_signature.details: Request to api.anthropic.com/v1/messages timed out after 600.0 seconds while waiting for response body.

problem.goal_state: Complete long-running CrewAI research task with extensive tool use

solutions.solution_summary: Enable streaming to avoid read timeouts on long-running LLM requests
solution_steps: Enable streaming on the Anthropic client to receive partial responses and keep the connection alive
Configure CrewAI to use streaming: set the llm parameter with streaming=True in the Agent constructor
Reduce the complexity of individual prompts to decrease generation time: break large tasks into smaller sub-tasks
Set max_tokens to a reasonable limit (4096) to prevent the model from generating extremely long responses
Monitor API status at status.anthropic.com for any ongoing service degradation

solutions.solution_summary: Implement request chunking to stay within timeout windows
solution_steps: Break the research task into smaller subtasks that complete within 120 seconds each
Use CrewAI's task decomposition: set each Task to have a focused, narrow objective
Configure an intermediate timeout of 300 seconds with automatic retry on timeout
Implement checkpointing so progress is saved between subtask executions

failure_signature.details: 504 Gateway Time-out: The server did not receive a timely response from the upstream server.

problem.goal_state: Complete AutoGen coding task with iterative code generation and execution

solutions.solution_summary: Handle 504 gateway timeouts with retry logic and request optimization
solution_steps: Add retry logic specifically for 504 errors with exponential backoff starting at 5 seconds
Check the OpenAI status page at status.openai.com for any ongoing incidents
Reduce the size of the conversation history sent with each request by summarizing earlier messages
If the 504 occurs during function calling, simplify the function schema to reduce processing time on the server side
Consider using gpt-4o-mini for initial iterations and gpt-4o only for final refinement to reduce load

failure_signature.details: Connection to internal-tool-api:8080 timed out after 5.0 seconds. The tool server may be down or unreachable.

problem.goal_state: Agent calling custom HTTP tool for database queries

solutions.solution_summary: Add health checks and circuit breaker pattern for external tool endpoints
solution_steps: Implement a health check that verifies tool server availability before starting the agent run
Add a circuit breaker pattern: after 3 consecutive timeouts, mark the tool as unavailable and skip it for 60 seconds
Increase the per-tool timeout for known slow endpoints: configure timeout=30 on the tool's HTTP client
Provide the agent with a graceful fallback message when a tool is unavailable instead of raising an exception
Log all tool timeouts with full context (URL, headers, timeout value) for debugging
